svg.title: OpenCloud File Archiver runtime architecture
svg.desc: The OpenCloud Web file archiver extension sends authenticated archive, extraction and preview requests through the same-origin archive route to a Go companion service. The service uses the same authorization to access OpenCloud through WebDAV. Optional Core Web patches enhance native integration but are not required.
svg.text: Runtime architecture and authenticated data flow

g.text: Header fallback when the snackbar extension point is absent
REST commands, SSE / polling, preview content and downloads
Spools and generated downloads; TTL cleanup
The user's Authorization is forwarded end-to-end; the service does not bypass WebDAV.

svg.text: Fallbacks keep unpatched Web builds working.
Reference patches support integration experiments and upstreaming.

g.text: Keeps task UI above picker actions
